name: Board App
description: Infinite canvas whiteboard for brainstorming, diagramming, and visual collaboration. Supports sticky notes, shapes, freehand drawing, connectors, and text — like Miro. Best for team brainstorming tools, wireframing, mind mapping, or any visual planning board.

deploy.title: Deploy your Whiteboard
deploy.subtitle: Like Miro — your own infinite canvas board in minutes

prompts.label: What will you use it for?
prompts.placeholder: e.g. Sprint retrospectives and brainstorming sessions

prompts.label: Any other details?
prompts.placeholder: Default sticky note colors, shape templates, custom categories...
